EU CONSIDER Project Assignment Announcement

Dear Researchers and Administrative Staff,

We are looking for people to contribute to the EU CONSIDER Project on the Management of Industrial Heritage for Sustainable Urban Development. The project aims to protect industrial heritage and use it in urban transformation.

The people to be assigned will include researchers and administrative staff. Researchers should be distinguished by their work on sustainable management of industrial heritage and urban development. Administrative staff should have skills such as supporting research activities, collecting and analyzing data.

Those who want to take part in the project must have certain qualifications, including research experience, administrative expertise and working experience in the relevant field.

Applications will be

accepted until May 9, 2024

at the latest. Frequently asked questions are listed below. For more information, please read the information below, and to apply, please contact Ebru Şevli from the Project Management Office at

[email protected]

.

We are excited to contribute to the EU CONSIDER Project and look forward to your applications.
